heading: Eligibility for veterans’ burial and cemetery benefits
label: 11201 Eligibility for veterans’ burial and cemetery benefits
notes: References in TextThe date of the enactment of this chapter, referred to in subsec. (c), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 105–368Nov. 11, 1998

children.label: B
children.text: Chapter 24 (relating to interment in national cemeteries).

children.label: A
children.text: receives an honorable service certificate under ; andsection 11203 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: is not eligible under any other provision of law for benefits under laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs.

children.heading: .—Reimbursement for Benefits Provided
children.label: b .—Reimbursement for Benefits Provided
children.text: The Secretary shall reimburse the Secretary of Veterans Affairs for the value of benefits that the Secretary of Veterans Affairs provides for an individual by reason of eligibility under this section.

children.heading: .—General rule
children.label: 1 .—General rule
children.text: Benefits may be provided under the provisions of law referred to in subsection (a)(1) by reason of this chapter only for deaths occurring after the date of the enactment of this chapter.

children.heading: .—Burials, etc. in national cemeteries
children.label: 2 .—Burials, etc. in national cemeteries
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraph (1), in the case of an initial burial or columbarium placement after the date of the enactment of this chapter, benefits may be provided under chapter 24 of title 38 by reason of this chapter (regardless of the date of death), and in such a case benefits may be provided under section 2306 of such title.
